rows.label: tev023101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Stella about Chausson.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Stella if she's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Stella about Chausson.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Stella if she's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0001
rows.name:
We officers are aware that not all of
NLA's citizens are on board with
Director General Chausson's policies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0002
rows.name:
But the more we allow our ideals
to enslave us, the grimmer our
situation will become.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hopefully some breakthrough opportunity will present
itself eventually. And you've got the look of someone
who just might be able to accomplish that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you're ever ready to be that
opportunity, let me know and I'll
assign you something important.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Are you familiar with the continent
comprised of nothing but wastelands
far to the east of NLA?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0013
rows.name:
We're receiving reports of non-naturally
occurring structures in that region.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0014
rows.name:
We need to find some answers about
who built these structures and what
became of them, and do it fast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0015
rows.name:
I guess I'll have to post a mission
for the Pathfinder Union...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0028
rows.name:
I was surprised at how readily Director
General Chausson accepted the Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0029
rows.name:
Although he DID put them through a
rigorous medical evaluation to make
sure they were no danger to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Perhaps he believes that the Ma-non
can provide the guidance we beleaguered
humans so desperately need.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Although from my conversations with the
Ma-non, I don't get the sense that they're
in such a great position to help us...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0035
rows.name:
We have reliable reports that
confirm the existence of intelligent
life in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0036
rows.name:
Is it possible that another sapient alien
race like the Ma-non is hiding there?
Perhaps one that bears us no ill will?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0037
rows.name:
We could certainly benefit from additional
alliances. We must expand FrontierNet so
we can collect more information![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0038
rows.name:
Director General Chausson is
making preparations for an influx
of various kinds of xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0039
rows.name:
The primary concern of our human
residents is the possible effects of
unidentified viruses and bacteria.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0040
rows.name:
As of yet, none of our medical examinations
have found anything of the sort.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0041
rows.name:
Since we are able to communicate freely with them,
the major concern now is convincing our current
residents to welcome the xenoforms with open arms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0047
rows.name:
We are truly fortunate to have
made friends who possess talents
that we humans lack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0050
rows.name:
We will benefit from the intelligence of the
Ma-non, the strength of the Bias, and, for what
it's worth, the business acumen of the Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0051
rows.name:
A peaceful and prosperous
future for humanity on Mira
may soon be within our reach.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023101_MSG0052
rows.name:
We owe that to you, [ST:playername ].
You have my gratitude.[ST:wait ]
